sources.title: Context.dev — One API to scrape, enrich, and extract the internet
sources.reason: Selected: directly useful for AI/coding-agent products that need web scraping, Markdown conversion, structured extraction, screenshots, and enrichment through one API; strongest Product Hunt traction in raw corpus at 825 votes.

sources.title: Glaze by Raycast — Create your own Mac apps by chatting with AI
sources.reason: Selected: concrete AI-native app-building workflow on macOS from a known desktop productivity vendor; PH shows 467 votes and 81 comments.

sources.title: Macuse — Give Your AI Superpowers on macOS
sources.reason: Selected: connects Claude, Codex, Cursor, Raycast, and MCP clients to macOS apps plus Computer Use, directly relevant to local agent workflows and permissions.

rejected.title: Basedash Actions
rejected.reason: Good agentic BI/action item, but lower priority than selected items for a coding-agent daily report; kept out to stay within 2-3 items.

rejected.title: Flowly
rejected.reason: Relevant personal agent, but description is broad and less concrete than Context.dev/Macuse for developer workflows.

rejected.title: Archify
rejected.reason: Developer-tool relevant, but raw evidence is thin beyond 'understand software' browser inspection.

rejected.title: Banger Mail
rejected.reason: AI agents in shared mailboxes, but mainly team inbox SaaS and less central to AI/coding-agent readers.

rejected.title: Needle
rejected.reason: Agentic GTM product; rejected as vertical sales workflow rather than broad AI/coding-agent infrastructure.

rejected.title: Macro
rejected.reason: Broad all-in-one workspace with shared memory; agent relevance is generic.

notes: Used raw corpus as primary evidence and 2026-07-03 report as dedupe reference. selected_items.json was not present. Duplicate topic files were deduplicated at product level for judgment.
